texts.label: text
texts.orig: Thank you for choosing to work with Flair Camp Experiences. The rates below are net and noncommission-able. Please note that the same rate applies for residents and Non Resident for the indicated period.
texts.text: Thank you for choosing to work with Flair Camp Experiences. The rates below are net and noncommission-able. Please note that the same rate applies for residents and Non Resident for the indicated period.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: Terms and Conditions are indicated below after the 2025 rates.
texts.text: Terms and Conditions are indicated below after the 2025 rates.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Below are the rates for the period 2025 as categorized on the table. The rates are net and no commission is applicate (Contract). Our rack rates are 35% higher to direct clients. Contract rates are as shown.
texts.text: Below are the rates for the period 2025 as categorized on the table. The rates are net and no commission is applicate (Contract). Our rack rates are 35% higher to direct clients. Contract rates are as shown.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1.Rates are based on full board plan i.e. breakfast, lunch, dinner and evening tea/coffee.
texts.text: 1.Rates are based on full board plan i.e. breakfast, lunch, dinner and evening tea/coffee.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.Proof of citizenship is required at the time of booking and check in.
texts.text: 2.Proof of citizenship is required at the time of booking and check in.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.Rates are subject to availability and subject to change with prior notice.
texts.text: 3.Rates are subject to availability and subject to change with prior notice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.Our Lunch Time strictly Start from 12 .30 PM TO 3.30 PM. Clients arriving after 3pm will only be served afternoon tea with biting's please alert
texts.text: 4.Our Lunch Time strictly Start from 12 .30 PM TO 3.30 PM. Clients arriving after 3pm will only be served afternoon tea with biting's please alert

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Daily check in is from 12.00 pm and check out is at 10.00 am. Special Considerations may be made for early check in extended departures subject to availability.
texts.text: Daily check in is from 12.00 pm and check out is at 10.00 am. Special Considerations may be made for early check in extended departures subject to availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6. Local government tax and levies are included in the rates.
texts.text: Local government tax and levies are included in the rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 7. 1 bottle of water is served in the room per day per person.
texts.text: 1 bottle of water is served in the room per day per person.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 8. Drinks are not included in the rate are payable at the bar upon consumption.
texts.text: Drinks are not included in the rate are payable at the bar upon consumption.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9. No drinks from outside are allowed within the common area. They are consumed in the room, car or during game drive.
texts.text: No drinks from outside are allowed within the common area. They are consumed in the room, car or during game drive.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.Children aged 3-11 years sharing with TWO adults pay 50% and if in own rooms 75%.
texts.text: 2.Children aged 3-11 years sharing with TWO adults pay 50% and if in own rooms 75%.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. 0-14 days prior to the date NO refund will be made.
texts.text: 0-14 days prior to the date NO refund will be made.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. 15-30 days 25% refund or post pone a later date subject to availability.
texts.text: 15-30 days 25% refund or post pone a later date subject to availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. 30-60 days 50% refund or postpone a later date subject to availability.
texts.text: 30-60 days 50% refund or postpone a later date subject to availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. 60 days and above full amount is refundable excluding bank charges
texts.text: 60 days and above full amount is refundable excluding bank charges

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1.All payments must be cleared before check in is granted.
texts.text: 1.All payments must be cleared before check in is granted.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.50% advance payments to confirm booking,50% to be paid before check in.
texts.text: 2.50% advance payments to confirm booking,50% to be paid before check in.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.All payments to be done through the accounts in (E) below.
texts.text: 3.All payments to be done through the accounts in (E) below.

texts.text: 3.All cheques are payable to FLAIR BUDGET CAMP EXPERIENCES LTD
